wpgen_conseq.solution:
Lemma wpgen_conseq : forall t E Q1 Q2,
  Q1 ===> Q2 ->
  wpgen E t Q1 ==> wpgen E t Q2.
Proof using.
  introv M. applys mkstruct_conseq M.
Qed.
wpgen_conseq.explanation: Consequence for wpgen follows directly from mkstruct_conseq, since wpgen wraps everything in mkstruct.

wpgen_frame.solution:
Lemma wpgen_frame : forall t E H Q,
  wpgen E t Q \* H ==> wpgen E t (Q \*+ H).
Proof using.
  intros. applys mkstruct_frame.
Qed.
wpgen_frame.explanation: Frame for wpgen follows directly from mkstruct_frame.

triple_succ_using_incr_with_xlemmas.solution:
Lemma triple_succ_using_incr_with_xlemmas : forall (n:int),
  triple (succ_using_incr n)
    \[]
    (fun r => \[r = n + 1]).
Proof using.
  intros. applys triple_app_fun_of_wpgen. simpl.
  applys xstruct_lemma. applys xlet_lemma.
  { applys xstruct_lemma. applys xapp_lemma. applys triple_ref. xsimpl. xsimpl. }
  intros p. simpl. applys xstruct_lemma. applys xseq_lemma.
  { applys xstruct_lemma. applys xapp_lemma. applys triple_incr. xsimpl. xsimpl. }
  applys xstruct_lemma. applys xapp_lemma. applys triple_get. xsimpl.
  xsimpl. auto.
Qed.
triple_succ_using_incr_with_xlemmas.explanation: Prove succ_using_incr using the x-lemmas (xstruct_lemma, xlet_lemma, xseq_lemma, xapp_lemma) instead of x-tactics.

triple_succ_using_incr_with_xtactics.solution:
Lemma triple_succ_using_incr_with_xtactics : forall (n:int),
  triple (succ_using_incr n)
    \[]
    (fun r => \[r = n + 1]).
Proof using.
  xwp. xapp. intros p. xapp. xapp. xsimpl. auto.
Qed.
triple_succ_using_incr_with_xtactics.explanation: Same proof but using x-tactics (xwp, xapp, xsimpl) which automate the application of x-lemmas.

triple_succtwice_using_xletval.solution:
Lemma triple_succtwice_using_xletval : forall (n:int),
  triple (succtwice n)
    \[]
    (fun r => \[r = n + 2]).
Proof using.
  xwp. xletval. intros g Hg. xapp. xsimpl. math.
Qed.
triple_succtwice_using_xletval.explanation: Use xletval to handle the local function binding, then apply the function.

triple_succtwice_using_xfun.solution:
Lemma triple_succtwice_using_xfun : forall (n:int),
  triple (succtwice n)
    \[]
    (fun r => \[r = n + 2]).
Proof using.
  xwp. xfun (fun g => forall m, triple (g m) \[] (fun r => \[r = m + 1])).
  { intros. xwp. xapp. xsimpl. math. }
  intros Hg. xapp. xsimpl. math.
Qed.
triple_succtwice_using_xfun.explanation: Use xfun to specify the local function with its spec, prove the spec, then use it.

wpgen_sound_seq.solution:
Lemma wpgen_seq_sound : forall t1' t2' F1 F2,
  formula_sound t1' F1 ->
  formula_sound t2' F2 ->
  formula_sound (trm_seq t1' t2') (wpgen_seq F1 F2).
Proof using.
  introv S1 S2. unfolds formula_sound. intros Q.
  unfolds wpgen_seq. applys himpl_trans.
  2:{ applys wp_seq. }
  { applys himpl_trans.
    { applys S1. }
    { applys wp_conseq. intros v. applys S2. } }
Qed.
wpgen_sound_seq.explanation: Soundness for sequence: chain the soundness of F1 and F2 through the wp_seq rule.

wpgen_val_sound.solution:
Lemma wpgen_val_sound : forall v,
  formula_sound (trm_val v) (wpgen_val v).
Proof using. intros. intros Q. unfolds wpgen_val. applys wp_val. Qed.
wpgen_val_sound.explanation: Values are trivially sound: wpgen_val v Q = Q v which entails wp (trm_val v) Q.

wpgen_let_sound.solution:
Lemma wpgen_let_sound : forall F1 F2of x t1 t2,
  formula_sound t1 F1 ->
  (forall v, formula_sound (subst x v t2) (F2of v)) ->
  formula_sound (trm_let x t1 t2) (wpgen_let F1 F2of).
Proof using.
  introv S1 S2. intros Q. unfolds wpgen_let. applys himpl_trans_r wp_let.
  applys himpl_trans S1. applys wp_conseq. intros v. applys S2.
Qed.
wpgen_let_sound.explanation: Soundness for let: compose soundness of the bound expression and the body after substitution.

mkstruct_idempotent.solution:
Lemma mkstruct_idempotent : forall F,
  mkstruct (mkstruct F) = mkstruct F.
Proof using.
  intros. apply functional_extensionality. intros Q.
  apply himpl_antisym.
  { unfold mkstruct. xpull. intros Q'. xchange (mkstruct_erase F Q').
    intros H M. xsimpl (Q' \*+ H) . auto. xsimpl. }
  { applys mkstruct_erase. }
Qed.
mkstruct_idempotent.explanation: mkstruct is idempotent: applying it twice is the same as applying it once, since it already includes consequence and frame.

xconseq_lemma.solution:
Lemma xconseq_lemma : forall Q1 Q2 H F,
  H ==> mkstruct F Q1 ->
  Q1 ===> Q2 ->
  H ==> mkstruct F Q2.
Proof using.
  introv M WQ. xchange M. applys mkstruct_conseq. applys WQ.
Qed.
xconseq_lemma.explanation: Verified proof: consequence rule for the mkstruct-wrapped formula. Chain via mkstruct_conseq on WQ.

xframe_lemma.solution:
Lemma xframe_lemma : forall H1 H2 H Q Q1 F,
  H ==> H1 \* H2 ->
  H1 ==> mkstruct F Q1 ->
  Q1 \*+ H2 ===> Q ->
  H ==> mkstruct F Q.
Proof using.
  introv W1 W2 W3. xchange W1. xchange W2.
  applys himpl_trans. applys mkstruct_frame.
  applys mkstruct_conseq. applys W3.
Qed.
xframe_lemma.explanation: Verified proof: frame rule for mkstruct-wrapped formula. Uses mkstruct_frame and mkstruct_conseq.

  wpgen_fun = wpgen_fun'.
Proof using.
  unfold wpgen_fun, wpgen_fun'. applys fun_ext_2.
  intros Fof Q. applys himpl_antisym.
 { applys himpl_hforall_r. intros vf. xchange (hforall_specialize vf).
   xsimpl. intros M. rewrite hwand_hpure_l. xsimpl.
   introv. rewrite wp_equiv. applys M. xsimpl. }
 (* FILL IN HERE *) Admitted.

triple_forloop.solution:
Lemma triple_forloop : forall (I:int->hprop) (a b:int) (f:val),
  a <= b ->
  (forall i, a <= i <= b ->
    triple (f i)
      (I i)
      (fun u => I (i+1))) ->
  triple (forloop a b f)
    (I a)
    (fun r => I b).
Proof using. (* FILL IN HERE *) Admitted.
triple_forloop.explanation: Auto-generated scaffold. Replace `Admitted.` with an actual proof.
